postReview.title: Germany 5-0 Hungary: Musiala wreaks havoc against Hungary
postReview.description: Jamal Musiala scored and provided a hat-trick of assists to lead Germany to a 5-0 drubbing of Hungary in the Nations League in Dusseldorf.

preReview.title: Ter Stegen distances himself from Bayern after replacing Neuer as Germany number one
preReview.description: Marc-Andre ter Stegen has had to bide his time, but is finally Germany's number one goalkeeper.
